__fixture__.name: audit_only_raw_secret_observed
__fixture__.scenario: Audit-only scan of a self-hosted-org workspace observes a raw registry credential present in workspace state (a checked-in dotfile-style token). Because raw secrets in workspace state are forbidden on every action class except audit_only_no_state_change, the scan is admissible and surfaces raw_secret_in_workspace_state_observed = true on the audit record. The audit emits the matching denial event (separate fixture audit_raw_secret_denial_event.json) with denial_reason_class = raw_secret_in_workspace_state_forbidden so the migration path to a secret-broker handle is explicit.
contract_sections: Schema-level invariant: raw_secret_in_workspace_state_observed admissible only on audit_only_no_state_change
acceptance_bullets: 2: registry-auth posture distinguishes raw secret in workspace state from secret-broker handle

registry_source.registry_disclosure: Audit reviewed configured registry references; the workspace stores a raw token alongside the configured endpoint.

registry_auth.auth_disclosure: Audit observed a raw token persisted in workspace state. Migration to a secret-broker handle is required before any mutation-class action.

lockfile_impact.lockfile_impact_disclosure: Audit does not modify lockfile state.

transitive_impact.transitive_impact_disclosure: Audit does not change the transitive set.

rollback_posture.rollback_posture_disclosure: Read-only audit; nothing to roll back.

mirror_or_offline_state.mirror_or_offline_state_disclosure: Online; audit operated against local workspace state only.

transport_posture_at_event.transport_posture_note: Self-hosted profile; org policy admits audit scans on workspace state.
